emails.subject: Re: Deal 459243.01
emails.body: Re: Deal 459243.01 Prebon is sending a new confirmation with Constellation as the counterparty. Broker mistake. Stephanie Piwetz 11/16/2000 01:00 PM

emails.subject: Re: Deal 459243.01
emails.body: Okay, I don't know where Jeff's head was today, but he just checked with Prebon and found he had done this deal without even knowing it! So he entered it Deal #461171. Thanks a lot for your patience, Stephanie. Stephanie Piwetz 11/16/2000 02:32 PM
